CustomField.description: This is an optional field for programs wanting to report on the living situation of applicants. Tip: Identify standard indicators and make sure staff understand how the program defines these picklist values. You can edit the values if necessary.
CustomField.inlineHelpText:
This is an optional field for programs wanting to report on the living situation of applicants.
Tip: Identify standard indicators and make sure staff understand how the program defines these picklist values. You can edit the values if necessary.
CustomField.label: Quality of Living Situation
